name: Sector
description: Pie sectors of changing sweep, each disc eating a different slice and spinning to a new bearing.

code.style: --rule: ( --rot: @pick(0deg, 90deg, 180deg, 270deg); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { width: 88%; height: 88%; margin: 6%; border-radius: 50%; background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); -webkit-clip-path: @pick(polygon(50% 50%, 50% 0, 100% 0, 100% 100%, 50% 100%), polygon(50% 50%, 100% 50%, 100% 100%, 0 100%, 0 50%), polygon(50% 50%, 50% 0, 100% 0, 100% 50%)); clip-path: @pick(polygon(50% 50%, 50% 0, 100% 0, 100% 100%, 50% 100%), polygon(50% 50%, 100% 50%, 100% 100%, 0 100%, 0 50%), polygon(50% 50%, 50% 0, 100% 0, 100% 50%)); -webkit-transform: rotate(@var(--rot)); transform: rotate(@var(--rot)); } -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
